title: Refreshing SMP modpack
description: Heavyweight kitchen sink modpack based around exploration and create, with tons of new biomes for the overworld and the end!
body:
# A "Refreshing" Take of modded minecraft
Explore various biomes added by [Terralith!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith),
Create various contraptions thanks to [Create!](https://modrinth.com/mod/create),
Build your house the way you want with MrCrayFish's Furniture mod and Create: Copycats,
Melt, alloy, tinker and tweak with the amazing Tinker's Construct

Guaranteed fun, especially in multiplayer!

This modpack is mainly intended for private use on the Refreshed: Reborn SMP, however feel free to use it.

Have a Refreshing experience!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

you just lost the game

</details>
